title: Wydawnictwo Dragon
description: Developed a professional corporate platform for a leading publishing house. The solution features a comprehensive digital product catalog with advanced categorization and search capabilities, enabling readers to seamlessly browse a diverse range of titles.

title: Bakosport
description: Engineered a robust corporate website featuring a custom Content Management System (CMS) and a dedicated project management panel. The system provides the client with complete control over their portfolio and service realisations, streamlining their digital presence.

title: PLAST-BUD
description: Designed and implemented a high-performance business showcase with an integrated content delivery system. The project included a tailored administrative panel for managing real-time updates of the company's extensive service portfolio.

title: PHU "MADOR"
description: Built a comprehensive digital storefront and product catalog for an industrial supplier. Focused on delivering a highly performant user interface with detailed technical specifications and optimized imagery to facilitate business-to-business decision making.
